title: Disable Animations
body:
## This mod is in beta - watch out for bugs!
I couldn't find a mod that disables the 1.15+ hand swing when dropping items, so I made one. This mod adds commands to disable certain animations, like using or dropping items.
Use `/dahelp` in-game for more information. Works on both multiplayer and singleplayer :)

(Config file: `.minecraft/config/da_config.json`)
